introSection: Boomerang is a Vekoma shuttle roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On October 8, 1998, Six Flags Fiesta Texas announced that they would be adding Poltergeist, Boomerang, Scream and twelve other attractions. This would be a part of the park's $30 million expansion.

Boomerang opened on March 13, 1999.

The ride received a new train for the 2023 season.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: When the ride begins, the train is pulled backwards up the lift hill, before being dropped through the loading station and into a cobra roll and then a vertical loop. At the end of this cycle, the train is pulled up the lift hill at the end of the track, then dropped once again allowing the train to go back through the design backwards.

fullText:
Boomerang is a Vekoma shuttle roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

On October 8, 1998, Six Flags Fiesta Texas announced that they would be adding Poltergeist, Boomerang, Scream and twelve other attractions. This would be a part of the park's $30 million expansion.

Boomerang opened on March 13, 1999.

The ride received a new train for the 2023 season.

When the ride begins, the train is pulled backwards up the lift hill, before being dropped through the loading station and into a cobra roll and then a vertical loop. At the end of this cycle, the train is pulled up the lift hill at the end of the track, then dropped once again allowing the train to go back through the design backwards.
